parse_requirements)
install_req_from_line
#install_req_from_parsed_requirement)
(protect_pip_from_modification_on_windowsc
UninstallCommandaB
    Uninstall packages.
    pip is able to uninstall most installed packages. Known exceptions are:
    - Pure distutils packages installed with ``python setup.py install``, which
      leave behind no metadata to determine what files were installed.
    - Script wrappers installed by ``python setup.py develop``.
    zU
      %prog [options] <package> ...
      %prog [options] -r <requirements file> ...N)
returnc
--requirement
requirements
append
filezjUninstall all the packages listed in the given requirements file.  This option can be used multiple times.)
dest
action
default
metavar
helpz
--yes
store_truez2Don't ask for confirmation of uninstall deletions.)
cmd_optsZ
add_option
parserZ
insert_option_group)
self
D/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/pip/_internal/commands/uninstall.py
add_options$
UninstallCommand.add_options)
options
argsr
q`qN|
}	|	r
isolatedzSInvalid requirement: %r ignored - the uninstall command expects named requirements.)
sessionz*You must give at least one requirement to z
 (see "pip help z

	verbosityZ
